setup.note: Microsoft Work IQ Teams remote MCP server, currently preview. Requires Microsoft 365 Copilot licensing, tenant admin enablement/consent, a Microsoft Entra tenant ID, and an Entra app/client allowed to request the Work IQ Teams MCP permission. Enter the full tenant-scoped URL after replacing {tenantId}. The Entra OAuth client can usually be public PKCE, so a client secret is optional unless your tenant/app registration requires it. References: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-copilot-studio/mcp-teams-work-iq and https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-agent-365/tooling-servers-overview

inputs.label: Microsoft Entra OAuth Client
inputs.description: Client ID, and optionally client secret, for the Microsoft Entra app registration.
inputs.note: Use the FlexiGPT OAuth redirect URL in the Entra app registration. Client secret is optional for public PKCE clients.
